title: Tax' Creepy Musician
description: Creepy Musician is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to replace the ingame background music with creepy music.
body:
Overview:
Creepy Musician is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to replace the ingame background music with creepy music.

![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f6b2c8a3057528d59831d838411c0ec4dfc1b81_0.webp)
Information:
This pack is aspecially written for the Cave Horror Project modpack. Try out this amazing pack.

Credit:
Written by Taknax.
